payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for the Sam-from-Goldman context. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would risk showing stale information.
payload.decision: mem_new was returned because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the query. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to Sam from Goldman, and the recall system resolved that context to the active memory mem_new while excluding superseded memory mem_old.

payload.intent: Explain recall/debug behavior for Sam from Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered.

memory_cards.statement: Recall selected mem_new for Sam from Goldman as the active memory and excluded mem_old because mem_old is marked superseded.

details: Explained that mem_new was recalled as current.
Explained that mem_old was excluded due to supersession.
Did not present the superseded mem_old as a current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old should still be considered valid, remove or revise its superseded status.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or delete mem_new and restore the appropriate current memory.
If both memories refer to different people named Sam, split the entity resolution so each Sam has a distinct entity record.

raw_text: {"intent":"Explain recall/debug behavior for Sam from Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered.","decision":"mem_new was returned because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the query. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"debug_explanation","statement":"Recall selected mem_new for Sam from Goldman as the active memory and excluded mem_old because mem_old is marked superseded.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"queried entity"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation/context"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"is_superseded_by","object":"mem_new"},{"subject":"mem_new","predicate":"matches_query_context","object":"Sam from Goldman"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolved_to_current_memory","entity_id":"mem_new","reason":"The query refers to Sam from Goldman, and the recall system resolved that context to the active memory mem_new while excluding superseded memory mem_old."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for the Sam-from-Goldman context. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would risk showing stale information.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["If mem_old should still be considered valid, remove or revise its superseded status.","If mem_new is incorrect, update or delete mem_new and restore the appropriate current memory.","If both memories refer to different people named Sam, split the entity resolution so each Sam has a distinct entity record."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Explained that mem_new was recalled as current.","Explained that mem_old was excluded due to supersession.","Did not present the superseded mem_old as a current fact."]}}
